The '''Super Transport VII''' was a large container [[Starship/Legends|ship]] built by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

==Characteristics==
Though substantially smaller than the later [[Super Transport XI]], it could still carry an impressive 2 million metric tons worth of cargo. Like other [[Super Transport series|Super Transports]], it was slow and carried no weapons or shields, and was highly vulnerable to [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] if unescorted.

==History==
One Super Transport VII, the ''[[Impasse]]'', was modified by [[Chalmer Trillili]], leader of the [[The Scourge|Scourge Pirates]], with a single [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]] salvaged from an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]].
